products.title: Cut Flower Garden Bundle
products.body_html:
Create your own cut flower patch at home and enjoy fresh, pollinator-friendly blooms from your garden.

Our Cut Flower Garden Bundle brings together a carefully chosen collection of practical garden accessories for sowing, cutting, gathering, tying and drying flowers and herbs. It is ideal for anyone who loves the idea of growing flowers for colour, pollinators, posies, small arrangements or seasonal displays.

The bundle includes our 6g Annual Pollinator Seeds, a colourful mix of annual flowers loved by bees, butterflies and other pollinators. Once in bloom, use the flower pruning scissors to snip fresh stems, gather them in the wooden flower trug, tie small bunches with the garden twine dispenser, and dry favourite flowers or herbs on the flower and herb drying rack.

A lovely choice for gardeners, flower lovers and anyone looking to bring more colour, wildlife and seasonal beauty into their garden and home.

What’s included

  • Flower Pruning Scissors
    Handy for cutting flowers, herbs and soft garden stems.
  • Flower & Herb Drying Rack
    Ideal for naturally drying flowers, herbs and seed heads.
  • Garden Twine Dispenser
    A practical garden essential for tying stems, bunches and supports.
  • Wooden Flower Trug
    Perfect for gathering cut flowers, herbs or small garden harvests.
  • 6g Annual Pollinator Seeds
    A colourful annual seed mix to support bees, butterflies and other pollinators.

Everything included is worth €72.50 when bought separately.

A practical and beautiful cut flower gardening bundle for sowing pollinator-friendly annuals, cutting fresh stems, gathering flowers in a wooden trug, tying bunches and drying favourite blooms or herbs at home.

New to growing flowers for cutting? Read our simple guide to growing fresh summer bunches from seed.

Read the Cut Flower Guide



Please note: this bundle is supplied as a curated collection of individual products and does not currently include separate gift packaging.

products.title: Squirrel Feeder Large | Wooden
products.body_html:
A spacious feeding station for Ireland’s playful squirrels.

Squirrels are clever, agile garden visitors - full of energy and curiosity. This Large Squirrel Feeder gives them a safe and dedicated place to feed, helping to draw them away from bird feeders while offering a wonderful chance to watch them up close.

Made from pinewood with a durable zinc roof and clear plexiglass front, this feeder is designed to hold a generous amount of food, making it ideal for gardens where squirrels visit regularly. The two entrance points allow easy access, while the hinged roof opens for quick filling and cleaning.

Squirrels will quickly learn how to lift the lid to reach the food inside - a lovely piece of natural behaviour to observe from the window. Fill with peanuts, hazelnuts, walnuts, sunflower seeds, or suitable squirrel feed and place near trees or shrubs where squirrels already feel safe.

Why You’ll Love It

  • Larger capacity – holds a generous amount of food, ideal for regular squirrel visitors.
  • Designed for red squirrels – encourages natural feeding behaviour in a dedicated space.
  • Two entrance points – allows squirrels easy access from either side.
  • Protects bird feeders – gives squirrels their own feeding station away from bird food.
  • Durable design – made from pinewood, zinc, and clear plexiglass.
  • Easy to fill and clean – hinged roof lifts open for simple refilling.
  • Perfect for wildlife watching – observe squirrels as they feed, explore, and lift the lid themselves.

Installation Tips

  • Mount securely on a tree, fence, or post.
  • Place in a quiet, sheltered spot close to trees, hedging, or shrubs.
  • Fill with peanuts, hazelnuts, walnuts, sunflower seeds, or suitable squirrel feed.
  • Check and refill regularly, especially during colder months.
  • Clean often to help keep the feeding area hygienic.

Details

  • Dimensions: W 25.4 cm × D 17.5 cm × H 18.1 cm
  • Materials: Pinewood, zinc, plexiglass

products.title: Insect House Small | Wooden
products.body_html:
A compact home for garden pollinators and beneficial insects.

Insects play a vital role in a healthy garden - helping to pollinate flowers, support food chains, and keep natural ecosystems in balance. This small Bee & Insect House provides a safe, sheltered space for solitary bees and other beneficial insects to nest, rest, and overwinter.

Made from natural wood and bamboo, with a mix of hollow stems, drilled nesting holes, and sheltered compartments, it mimics the small crevices and natural habitats insects look for in the wild. Its compact size makes it perfect for smaller gardens, balconies, patios, school gardens, or as a simple biodiversity boost in any outdoor space.

Place it near wildflowers, herbs, or flowering plants and enjoy watching your garden become a little more alive through the seasons.

Why You’ll Love It

  • Supports pollinators – provides nesting and shelter for solitary bees and beneficial insects.
  • Compact and easy to place – ideal for gardens, balconies, patios, and smaller outdoor spaces.
  • Natural materials – made with wood and bamboo to mimic natural insect habitats.
  • All-season shelter – useful during nesting season and as a refuge through colder months.
  • Encourages biodiversity – a simple way to make your garden more welcoming to wildlife.

Installation Tips

  • Hang in a sunny, sheltered spot, facing south or southeast.
  • Keep near wildflowers or flowering plants for easy access to pollen and nectar.
  • Position at least 1–1.5 m above ground, away from heavy rain and strong winds.
  • Leave in place year-round to allow insects to overwinter safely.

Details

  • Dimensions: W 13.6 X D 8.1 X H 26.2
  • Materials: Spruce, Bamboo, Plywood

products.title: Meadow Lawn Seed | Grass
products.body_html:
A fine, low-input grass mix designed to create the structure of a traditional meadow.

Ideal as a base for wildflowers or for a softer, more natural grass area.

This meadow grass mix is designed to create a softer, more natural alternative to a traditional lawn.

Made up of fine fescue grasses, it forms a dense but low-growing sward that works with the natural conditions of your garden rather than against them. It requires less feeding and less frequent mowing than standard lawn mixes, while still providing good coverage and structure.

It can be used on its own for a simple, low-input grass area, or as the foundation for a wildflower meadow - helping to support longer-lasting, more balanced planting over time.

The result is a more relaxed, natural-looking space that fits easily into both gardens and larger landscapes.

Key Features

  • Fine grasses for a softer, more natural look
  • Lower input than traditional lawn mixes
  • Suitable for reduced mowing
  • Can be used alone or with wildflower seed
  • Helps create long-lasting meadow structure

Composition

A blend of fine, low-maintenance grasses:

  • 45% Strong Creeping Red Fescue (Festuca rubra)
    Provides structure, density and long-term resilience
  • 25% Slender Creeping Red Fescue (Festuca rubra litoralis)
    Helps fill gaps and improve coverage over time
  • 30% Chewings & Hard Fescues (Festuca rubra commutata & Festuca trachyphylla)
    Fine-leaved grasses that create a softer, more natural finish

Sowing Guide

  • Sowing rate: 35–50g/m²
  • Oversowing: 15–25g/m²
  • When to sow: March to October
  • Position: Sun or light shade

Best For

  • Meadow creation (with or without wildflowers)
  • Low-maintenance grass areas
  • Larger or less formal garden spaces
  • Natural landscaping

Good To Know

  • This is a grass-only mix (no wildflowers included)
  • More natural in appearance than a traditional lawn
  • Not designed for heavy wear or frequent mowing

A simple way to create a softer, lower-input grass space - with or without wildflowers.

products.title: Clover Lawn Seed | Grass
products.body_html:
A lower-maintenance lawn with a softer, more natural finish.

Blends fine grasses with clover to stay greener for longer and reduce the need for feeding.

If you’re looking for a lawn that works with nature rather than against it, this is a good place to start.

This clover lawn mix combines fine, low-input grasses with small-leaved clover to create a lawn that stays greener for longer, even in drier conditions. The clover naturally fixes nitrogen from the air, helping to feed the lawn and reduce the need for fertiliser.

The grasses provide structure and coverage, while the clover helps fill gaps over time, improving resilience and keeping the lawn looking healthy with less input.

The result is a softer, more natural lawn that’s easier to manage and better for biodiversity - while still being practical for everyday use.

Key Features 

  • Lower-maintenance alternative to traditional lawns
  • Naturally feeds itself, reducing the need for fertiliser
  • Stays greener for longer, even in dry conditions
  • Clover helps fill gaps and improve resilience
  • Supports pollinators when in flower

Composition

A balanced mix of fine grasses and clover:

Grasses (60%)

  • 35% Strong Creeping Red Fescue (Festuca rubra)
    Provides structure, durability and drought tolerance
  • 15% Chewings Fescue (Festuca rubra commutata)
    Fine-leaved grass for a neat, even finish
  • 10% Slender Creeping Red Fescue (Festuca rubra litoralis)
    Helps fill gaps and improve coverage over time

Clover (40%)

  • 20% Microclover
    Low-growing and blends into the lawn for a more subtle look
  • 20% Small-leaved White Clover (Trifolium repens)
    Adds resilience, fills gaps and supports pollinators

Sowing Guide

  • Sowing rate: 35–50g/m²
  • Oversowing: 25–50g/m²
  • When to sow: April to September (best in warmer soil)
  • Position: Sun or partial shade

Best For

  • Lower-maintenance lawns
  • Gardens looking to reduce fertiliser use
  • Softer, more natural lawn areas
  • General use (light to moderate traffic)

Good To Know

  • Contains clover, which will flower and attract pollinators
  • More natural in appearance than a traditional lawn
  • Not suited to very high-wear areas

A simple way to create a greener, lower-input lawn that gives something back.

products.title: Shaded Lawn Seed | Grass
products.body_html:
A resilient lawn mix for gardens with limited sunlight.

Designed to thrive in shade, creating a greener, more consistent lawn where standard mixes struggle.

Shady areas can be one of the hardest parts of a garden to get right. Many standard lawn mixes struggle in low light, leaving thin or patchy growth over time.

This shaded lawn mix is built differently. It uses fine, shade-tolerant grasses that establish well in lower light conditions, forming a dense, even lawn that holds its structure through the seasons.

The result is a softer, more natural-looking lawn that performs where others don’t — under trees, beside hedging, or in north-facing spaces.

Lower input and more forgiving than standard lawn mixes, it’s a practical way to improve those trickier parts of the garden.

Key features

  • Designed specifically for shaded and low-light areas
  • Establishes well where standard lawns struggle
  • Fine grasses create a dense, even finish
  • Lower input once established
  • Ideal for under trees and along boundaries

Composition

A blend of fine, shade-tolerant grasses:

  • 40% Strong Creeping Red Fescue (Festuca rubra)
    Forms a dense, resilient base and performs well in shade
  • 30% Chewings Fescue (Festuca rubra commutata)
    Fine-leaved grass that creates a neat, even finish
  • 20% Slender Creeping Red Fescue (Festuca rubra litoralis)
    Helps fill gaps and improves lawn coverage over time
  • 10% Rough-Stalked Meadow Grass (Poa trivialis)
    Particularly suited to shaded and damp conditions

Sowing guide

  • Sowing rate: 35–50g/m²
  • Oversowing: 25–50g/m²
  • When to sow: March to October
  • Position: Shade to partial sun

Best for

  • Shaded gardens and low-light areas
  • Under trees or near hedging
  • North-facing lawns

A simple solution for the more difficult corners of the garden.

products.title: Hard-Wearing Lawn Seed | Grass
products.body_html:
A durable, reliable lawn for everyday use.

Designed for busy gardens, this mix establishes quickly, stands up to wear, and keeps its colour through the seasons.

If your lawn needs to handle real life - foot traffic, pets, play - this is a dependable place to start.

This hard-wearing mix combines fast-establishing grasses with dense, resilient varieties that knit together to create a strong, even surface. It greens up quickly and recovers well after use, making it ideal for family gardens and general landscaping.

It’s a practical lawn choice: easy to establish, consistent in performance, and suited to a wide range of conditions.

While this is not a biodiversity-focused mix, it plays an important role in creating usable outdoor space - and can be complemented over time with clover or planting around the edges to support nature.

Key Features

  • Strong, durable lawn for everyday use
  • Fast to establish and quick to green up
  • Recovers well from wear and foot traffic
  • Suitable for family gardens, pets and play
  • Consistent, reliable performance

Composition

A balanced mix of durable and fast-establishing grasses:

  • 50% Strong Creeping Red Fescue (Festuca rubra)
    Provides density, structure and long-term resilience
  • 30% Tetraploid Perennial Ryegrass (Lolium perenne)
    Fast to establish and highly wear-tolerant
  • 20% Perennial Ryegrass (Lolium perenne)
    Adds durability and helps the lawn recover from use

Sowing guide

  • Sowing rate: 35–50g/m²
  • Oversowing: 25–50g/m²
  • When to sow: March to October
  • Position: Sun or light shade

Best for

  • General purpose lawns
  • High-traffic areas
  • New lawns and repairs

A straightforward, reliable lawn - designed to work with how your garden is actually used.

products.title: Hori Hori Knife with Sheath
products.body_html:
The ultimate multi-purpose garden tool.

Originating in Japan during the 16th century, the Hori Hori Knife (from the Japanese word hori, meaning “to dig”) is a tool of precision, versatility, and strength. Its curved, ridged, and razor-sharp stainless-steel blade makes it ideal for digging, cutting, weeding, planting, and pruning — a must-have for any gardener.

Use it to slice through roots, divide perennials, or replant seedlings with accuracy. The marked blade features both centimetre and inch measurements, allowing you to plant bulbs or seeds at the perfect depth. The included protective sheath ensures safe storage and easy carrying while working outdoors.

Why You’ll Love It:

  • All-in-one design – functions as a knife, saw, and digging tool.

  • High-quality stainless steel – strong, durable, and rust-resistant.

  • Practical & precise – depth markings for accurate planting.

  • Includes sheath – for safe storage and easy portability.

A timeless tool that brings craftsmanship and performance together — ideal for home gardeners and professionals alike.

Shop the Hori Hori Knife and experience the art of gardening, redefined.

products.title: Bird Print Enamel Mug
products.body_html:
A classic enamel mug with a nature-inspired twist.

Printed with a range of beautiful bird species, this sturdy enamel mug also features their names in Latin, giving it an added touch of character for bird lovers and nature enthusiasts alike. It’s perfect for everything from morning coffee in the garden to a warm drink by the fire.

Lightweight yet durable, it has that timeless, familiar feel that makes it just as suited to outdoor adventures as it is to everyday use at home. Its simple shape gives it a clean, modern look, while the detailed bird illustrations make it both practical and decorative.

A lovely gift for gardeners, birdwatchers and anyone who enjoys the quieter side of the outdoors.

Why you’ll love it

  • Printed with a range of bird species
  • Includes bird names in Latin
  • Classic enamel style with a timeless feel
  • Lightweight, durable and easy to use
  • Ideal for home, garden, camping or picnics

Details

  • Dimensions: W 13 × D 9.8 × H 9.2 cm
  • Materials: Enamelled iron, stainless steel

products.title: Childrens Flower Holder for Picking & Display | Wooden
products.body_html:
A simple, thoughtful way to enjoy flowers as you find them.

This wooden butterfly flower holder is designed for gathering and carrying freshly picked flowers, whether you’re out in the garden, on a walk, or exploring nature with children. With multiple small holes, it gently holds each stem in place - turning your collection into a natural, ever-changing display.

It’s as much about the experience as the end result. Slowing down, choosing each flower, and arranging them as you go. 

Pick a few stems as you go and place them into the holder to build your own arrangement. Once home, it doubles as a decorative piece - perfect on a windowsill or table.

Lightweight and easy to carry, it’s perfect for little hands and curious minds, as well as anyone who enjoys bringing a few wild or garden flowers home.

Why you’ll love it

  • A simple way to gather and carry freshly picked flowers
  • Holds stems neatly in place for a natural display
  • Encourages slow, mindful collecting
  • Ideal for children and nature walks
  • Made from natural wood

Details

  • Dimensions: W 18 × D 14.5 × H 0.5 cm
  • Material: 100% pine plywood
